channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [BEL] Bharat Electronics Board Meeting on 19 May 2026 for Results & Dividend
item.description:
Bharat Electronics Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 19, 2026, to consider and approve the audited standalone and consolidated financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board will also consider recommending a final dividend for the financial year 2025-26.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 19, 2026.
  • Consideration of audited standalone and consolidated financial results.
  • Financial results for quarter and year ended March 31, 2026 to be reviewed.
  • Recommendation of final dividend for FY 2025-26 on the agenda.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: BHARAT ELECTRONICS LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAITHANALL] Maithan Alloys: Sreejith Ariyanthari Thazhemadam Resigns as General Manager
item.description:
Mr. Sreejith Ariyanthari Thazhemadam, General Manager (Operations) and Plant Head of the Vishakhapatnam Unit of Maithan Alloys Ltd, has tendered his resignation due to personal reasons. The resignation will be effective from May 6, 2026. The company has accepted his resignation, as per regulatory filing under Regulation 30 of SEBI LODR regulations.

  • Sreejith Ariyanthari Thazhemadam resigns as General Manager (Operations).
  • Resignation is effective from May 6, 2026.
  • Resignation is due to personal reasons.
  • Company has accepted the resignation.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAITHAN ALLOYS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [RSWM] RSWM Ltd: Re-lodgement of Physical Share Transfer Requests
item.description:
RSWM Ltd reports on the re-lodgement of transfer requests for physical shares for April 2026, as per SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026. The report, dated 7th May, 2026, was received from MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited, the company's Registrar and Share Transfer Agent. No requests were received, processed, approved, or rejected during the month. The information is available on the company's website, www.rswm.in.

  • RSWM Ltd reports zero requests for re-lodgement of physical share transfers in April 2026.
  • The report is in compliance with SEBI Circular No. HO/38/13/11(2)2026-MIRSD-POD/I/3750/2026.
  • MCS Share Transfer Agent Limited is the Registrar and Share Transfer Agent for RSWM Ltd.
  • The report indicates no processing activity for physical share transfer requests during the month.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RSWM LTD. | Category: Business Update

item.title: [7TEC] Saven Technologies: Status of Physical Share Transfer Requests
item.description:
Saven Technologies Ltd. announced the status of re-lodgement of physical share transfer requests as of April 30, 2026, in accordance with SEBI circular no. SEBI/HO/38/13/11(2)2026 MIRSD-POD/1/3750/2026 dated 30th January, 2026. The information was received from their Registrar and Share Transfer Agent (RTA), XL Softech Systems Limited, and submitted to the stock exchanges for their records.

  • Saven Technologies reports on physical share transfer requests.
  • Compliance with SEBI circular dated January 30, 2026.
  • Information received from XL Softech Systems Limited (RTA).
  • Status as of April 30, 2026, provided to stock exchanges.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: SAVEN TECHNOLOGIES LTD. | Category: Regulatory

item.title: [HRMNYCP] Harmony Capital: Khyati Mishra Appointed Company Secretary
item.description:
Harmony Capital Services Ltd's board meeting on May 7, 2026, approved the appointment of Ms. Khyati Mishra as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective the same day. The board also approved the audited standalone financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, with an unmodified opinion from M/s Kapish Jain & Associates, Statutory Auditors. Additionally, the board approved the shifting of the registered office from Maharashtra to West Bengal, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, and the establishment of a corporate office in Kolkata. The board also approved alteration of MOA subject to members approval.

  • Khyati Mishra appointed as Company Secretary and Compliance Officer, effective May 7, 2026.
  • Audited standalone financial results for FY26 approved with an unmodified audit opinion.
  • Registered office relocation from Maharashtra to West Bengal approved, pending approvals.
  • Corporate office establishment in Kolkata approved.
  • Alteration of MOA approved subject to members approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: HARMONY CAPITAL SERVICES LTD. | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [AIRFLOA] Airfloa Rail Tech Receives ₹92.08 Lakhs Order
item.description:
Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd has received a new order worth ₹92.08 lakhs from Integral Coach Factory, Chennai, part of Indian Railways, on May 7, 2026. The order involves the supply and installation of nine sets of stainless steel nose cones for MEMU/DMC/JK(944). The order is to be executed within twelve months and is subject to Indian Railways standard contract conditions.

  • Airfloa Rail Tech secures a new order worth ₹92.08 lakhs from Integral Coach Factory.
  • The order involves supplying and installing stainless steel nose cones for railway coaches.
  • The contract is expected to be completed within a 12-month period.
  • Payment terms include 90% against PRC and IC, and the balance against Receipt Note and installation certificate.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Airfloa Rail Technology Ltd | Category: Business Update

item.title: [VALIANT] Valiant Communications Allots 2.5 Lakh Equity Shares
item.description:
Valiant Communications Ltd. has allotted 2,50,000 equity shares of face value ₹10 each, following the conversion of an equivalent number of warrants. These warrants, issued on November 27, 2025, at ₹768 each via preferential allotment, were converted based on requests from allottees including Rajiv Khanna, Prajesh Maroo, Niveshaay Hedgehogs Fund, and Niveshaay Sambhav Fund. Post-allotment, the company's paid-up equity share capital increased to ₹11,69,20,900, divided into 1,16,92,090 equity shares. 3,50,000 convertible warrants remain outstanding.

  • Valiant Communications allots 2,50,000 equity shares upon warrant conversion.
  • Equity shares have a face value of ₹10 each.
  • Post-allotment, paid-up equity share capital rises to ₹11,69,20,900.
  • 2,50,000 warrants were converted at an issue price of ₹768 each.
  • 3,50,000 convertible warrants remain outstanding for future conversion.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: VALIANT COMMUNICATIONS LTD.-$ | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [DEVX] DevX Wins Coworking Startup of the Year at ET Entrepreneur Awards 2026
item.description:
Dev Accelerator Ltd's newsletter for April 2026 highlights key achievements, including winning the 'Coworking Startup of the Year' award at the Economic Times Entrepreneur Awards 2026 for the second consecutive year. Phi Designs, its design arm, was awarded 'India's Most Futuristic Interior Design and Build Firm 2026'. The newsletter also notes the strengthening demand for enterprise workspaces in India, driven by the growth of Global Capability Centers.

  • DevX wins 'Coworking Startup of the Year' at ET Entrepreneur Awards 2026.
  • Phi Designs recognized as 'India's Most Futuristic Interior Design Firm'.
  • India's enterprise workspace demand is strengthening, driven by GCC growth.
  • India's GCC workforce is projected to reach 2 million by 2026.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Dev Accelerator Ltd | Category: Award

item.title: [NBCC] NBCC to Execute PFC's CSR Projects Worth ₹103.47 Cr
item.description:
🔥 Trending

NBCC (India) Ltd has been appointed by Power Finance Corporation Limited (PFC) as the Project Management Agency for executing its various CSR projects across multiple states. The total value of the CSR works awarded to NBCC is approximately ₹103.47 Cr (excluding GST). This project aligns with the company's normal course of business.

  • NBCC appointed as Project Management Agency by PFC.
  • CSR projects worth approximately ₹103.47 Cr awarded to NBCC.
  • The projects are in line with NBCC's normal business operations.
  • The CSR projects will be executed in various states.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: NBCC (India) Ltd | Category: CSR

item.title: [RBZJEWEL] RBZ Jewellers Board Meeting on May 14, 2026
item.description:
RBZ Jewellers Ltd has scheduled a Board of Directors meeting on May 14, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The trading window for dealing in the company's shares has been closed since April 1, 2026, and will remain closed until 48 hours after the declaration of the financial results.

  • RBZ Jewellers' board meeting is scheduled for May 14, 2026.
  • The board will approve audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026.
  • The trading window is closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours post-results declaration.
  • The meeting will also discuss and approve other incidental matters.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RBZ Jewellers Ltd | Category: Board Meeting
